source_jobs.title: Brand Communications & Events Lead
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT AGENTIO

Agentio enables marketers to buy creator led ads as easily and scalably as Meta or Google ads—automating sourcing, pricing, contracting, delivery, and measurement—so work that took months now happens in minutes.

We're on a mission to transform a $800B digital ad ecosystem by shifting digital ad spend into the hands of creators. That means better outcomes for marketers and enabling creators to live off their work—finally being paid in proportion to the value they create. That shift is accelerating: Unilever's CEO has said the company will move roughly half of its ad budget into social and creators—Unilever is among the world's largest advertisers, spending around $9–10B annually. As these dollars move, they need performance-grade pipes; Agentio is how those dollars flow to creators with the speed, control, and measurement marketers expect. We enable brands like Uber, DoorDash, and Bombas to run creator campaigns with the same rigor, control, and accountability as their core performance channels.

Our AI-Native platform enables real-time content understanding at scale, simultaneous reasoning across hundreds of thousands of pieces of content, and intelligent allocation of multi-million dollar budgets. Our models apply more cross-platform performance signal than anyone else in the world, compounding with every campaign through a high-trust marketplace with accelerating network effects. The result is a flywheel: brands get the performance they've been chasing, creators get the intelligence and income they deserve, and Agentio becomes the infrastructure powering a generational shift in where media dollars flow.

The market agrees. Agentio has raised $56M at a $340M valuation, including a Series B led by Forerunner https://techcrunch.com/2025/11/18/agentio-secures-40-million-from-forerunner-as-it-scales-its-creator-marketplace-beyond-youtube/ that followed our Series A within a calendar year. Backed by Benchmark, Craft, and AlleyCorp. Named to Forbes' Next Billion Dollar Startups, 2025 https://www.forbes.com/sites/amyfeldman/2025/08/12/next-billion-dollar-startups-2025/. Named to Inc.'s Best Places to Work 2026 https://www.inc.com/best-workplaces/2026, one of 10 companies nationally recognized in the "On the Rise: 0–4 Years in Business" category.

An $800B market. A once-in-a-generation technology shift. This is the moment. This is the team. Come build something generational with us.




ABOUT THE ROLE

As Agentio’s first Brand Communications & Events Lead, you own Agentio’s owned, earned and experiential strategy and execution including channels such as: Linkedin, Meta, X, Youtube, and PR. You’ll own the integrated events and comms calendar that puts Agentio at the center of the industry conversation, and define our voice. You’ll work directly with the CEO and executive team to ensure every trade story, piece of content or event ultimately drives brand awareness and marketing pipeline.




WHAT YOU’LL DO

PR & Earned Media

 - Build PR to be proactive and narrative-driven, tied directly to a thought-leadership and research pipeline.

 - Owns executive and journalist prep and implement post-mortems after every major press cycle.

 - Develop and maintain strong media and journalist relationships; bring an extensive publisher and press network to the role from day one.

 - Craft press-worthy storylines from product narratives - go beyond the press release to drive stories that shape category conversation.

Events Strategy & Execution

 - Own and execute end-to-end the integrated events and comms calendar: priority industry events, owned activations, speaking opportunities, and sponsorships.

 - Coordinate with Demand Gen and Content to ensure every event activation drives measurable lead-gen and brand impact.

 - Manage vendors and production partners to deliver exceptional event experiences on time and on budget.

Owned Channels & Brand Voice

 - Own Agentio’s voice and content strategy across owned channels: LinkedIn,

Named to Inc.'s Best Places to Work 2026 https://www.inc.com/best-workplaces/2026, one of 10 companies nationally recognized in the "On the Rise: 0–4 Years in Business" category.

An $800B market. A once-in-a-generation technology shift. This is the moment. This is the team. Come build something generational with us.




ABOUT THE ROLE

As Agentio’s first Growth Marketing Lead, you’ll build the systematic demand engine from scratch. Creating repeatable, measurable B2B pipeline from: ABM, paid channels, inbound and connect it tightly to content and sale pipeline.

You won’t be optimizing an existing program; you’ll be building the infrastructure, running the experiments, and owning the results. You’ll create and operate marketing performance reporting tied to the full customer journey, own the marketing-sourced pipeline number, and partner tightly with Sales to ensure every conversation is easier because prospects already know who Agentio is and why it matters. High visibility, high ownership, high impact.




WHAT YOU’LL DO


DEMAND GENERATION & PIPELINE

 - Build the demand engine from scratch: ABM strategy, paid LinkedIn, Search, B2B influencer strategy, and a scalable inbound/outbound assist motion aligned to the product narrative and ICP.

 - Own the marketing-sourced pipeline number - set targets, track performance, and report with clarity and confidence.

 - Run fast experiments across paid and organic channels; set up attribution and KPI cadences, and iterate based on data.


MARKETING OPERATIONS & REPORTING

 - Create and operate marketing performance reporting tied to customer journey KPIs: conversion rates, win-rate context, deal cycle, and retention signals.

 - Own the full marketing ops stack: dashboards, funnel architecture, tooling selection, and CRM/MAP hygiene.

 - Ensure every program is instrumented, measurable, and connected to rev

Agentio has raised $56M at a $340M valuation, including a Series B led by Forerunner https://techcrunch.com/2025/11/18/agentio-secures-40-million-from-forerunner-as-it-scales-its-creator-marketplace-beyond-youtube/ that followed our Series A within a calendar year. Backed by Benchmark, Craft, and AlleyCorp. Named to Forbes' Next Billion Dollar Startups, 2025 https://www.forbes.com/sites/amyfeldman/2025/08/12/next-billion-dollar-startups-2025/. Named to Inc.'s Best Places to Work 2026 https://www.inc.com/best-workplaces/2026, one of 10 companies nationally recognized in the "On the Rise: 0–4 Years in Business" category.

 

An $800B market. A once-in-a-generation technology shift. This is the moment. This is the team. Come build something generational with us.




THE ROLE

Our Finance & Ops function is scaling right alongside the business, and RevOps is at the center of it. This is a rare chance to help build the operational backbone of a category-defining marketplace from the ground up, early enough to shape how the entire GTM engine runs.

Agentio's growth depends on a world-class revenue engine that's precise, scalable, and tightly aligned across our go-to-market teams. We're hiring our first dedicated Senior RevOps Analyst to own the operational backbone of that engine, sitting at the intersection of Sales, Customer Success, Creator Partnerships, and Finance.

Reporting to the Senior Manager, RevOps, you'll own a defined domain: creator-side operations and the operational health of our supply, plus the cross-marketplace execution layer that keeps the GTM machine running day to day, including HubSpot administration, recurring reporting and dashboards, data operations, workflow automation, outreach and sequence optimization, tooling support, and the monthly billing cycle.

This is a high-ownership role for someone who is both a reliable operator and a sharp analyst. You'll run a heavy recurring execution load without dropping balls, bring structure to problems that aren't yet well defined, and lead the occasional high-priority initiative, translating your findings into crisp strategy docs and recommendations for leadership.

It's an ideal fit for someone highly analytical, detail-oriented, systems-curious, and excited to operate in a fast-scaling environment. The role is based in our NYC

WHAT YOU'LL DO

🎯 The Opportunity

This internship is ideal for ambitious students who want exposure to business development & creator partnerships within an early-stage, high-growth tech startup. You'll work cross-functionally with leadership across sales, creator strategy, and product to support both sides of our two-sided marketplace.

This role allows you to:

 1. Build, support, and grow relationships with high-performing YouTube creators and Talent managers/agencies.

 2. Gain hands-on experience working alongside a GTM team leveraging AI-driven tools and workflows.

 3. Learn how to pitch creators, communicate with managers, and start building a strong professional network in the creator economy.

You’ll be a foundational member of Agentio’s Go-To-Market team, reporting to the Creator Team Lead and working closely with the VP of Creator Strategy and VP of Sales to support end to end campaign execution and client satisfaction. With over 100 new hires planned for 2026, this role offers a clear pathway to a full-time position.

🔹 Creator Partnerships

 - Conduct research and use data on top YouTube creators and evaluate their fit with active brand campaigns.

 - Collaborate with the team on outreach strategy and creator relationship development

 - Manage a pipeline of creators and effectively communicate Agentio’s value proposition to onboard them.

An $800B market. A once-in-a-generation technology shift. This is the moment. This is the team. Come build something generational with us.




ABOUT THE ROLE

Agentio needs a cohesive visual identity and design system that scales across every touchpoint—product, sales, marketing, and events. Today, brand execution is fragmented: there is no design system, no brand governance, and the tools we use are inconsistent. This role builds the foundation.

As Agentio’s first brand design hire, you’ll create the scalable design system that ensures brand consistency from product UI to pitch deck to paid ad to event experience. This is a B2B-focused role, designing for enterprise buyers and internal teams. You’ll partner with product, GTM, and leadership to ensure brand and product feel cohesive, while also building high-quality sales and marketing assets that drive revenue.

This is a builder role: you’ll set up the infrastructure, produce the work, and elevate Agentio’s visual brand to match the sophistication of our platform and buyer expectations.




WHAT YOU’LL DO

Design Systems & Brand Infrastructure

 - Build and maintain a scalable B2B design system—typography, color, components, templates, and guidelines

 - Establish brand governance and systems that scale across product, GTM, and marketing

 - Partner with product design to ensure cohesion between brand and product experiences

Brand Building & Product Alignment

 - Help define and evolve Agentio’s visual identity

 - Ensure the brand meets the expectations of enterprise buyers—clear, credible, and sophisticated

 - Influence how brand and product design intersect

GTM & Sales Enablement Design

source_jobs.title: Talent Systems Engineer
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT AGENTIO

Agentio enables marketers to buy creator led ads as easily and scalably as Meta or Google ads—automating sourcing, pricing, contracting, delivery, and measurement—so work that took months now happens in minutes.

We're on a mission to transform a $800B digital ad ecosystem by shifting digital ad spend into the hands of creators. That means better outcomes for marketers and enabling creators to live off their work—finally being paid in proportion to the value they create. That shift is accelerating: Unilever's CEO has said the company will move roughly half of its ad budget into social and creators—Unilever is among the world's largest advertisers, spending around $9–10B annually. As these dollars move, they need performance-grade pipes; Agentio is how those dollars flow to creators with the speed, control, and measurement marketers expect. We enable brands like Uber, DoorDash, and Bombas to run creator campaigns with the same rigor, control, and accountability as their core performance channels.

Our AI-Native platform enables real-time content understanding at scale, simultaneous reasoning across hundreds of thousands of pieces of content, and intelligent allocation of multi-million dollar budgets. Our models apply more cross-platform performance signal than anyone else in the world, compounding with every campaign through a high-trust marketplace with accelerating network effects. The result is a flywheel: brands get the performance they've been chasing, creators get the intelligence and income they deserve, and Agentio becomes the infrastructure powering a generational shift in where media dollars flow.

The market agrees. Agentio has raised $56M at a $340M valuation, including a Series B led by Forerunner https://techcrunch.com/2025/11/18/agentio-secures-40-million-from-forerunner-as-it-scales-its-creator-marketplace-beyond-youtube/ that followed our Series A within a calendar year. Backed by Benchmark, Craft, and AlleyCorp. Named to Forbes' Next Billion Dollar Startups, 2025 https://www.forbes.com/sites/amyfeldman/2025/08/12/next-billion-dollar-startups-2025/. Named to Inc.'s Best Places to Work 2026 https://www.inc.com/best-workplaces/2026, one of 10 companies nationally recognized in the "On the Rise: 0–4 Years in Business" category.

An $800B market. A once-in-a-generation technology shift. This is the moment. This is the team. Come build something generational with us.



The opportunity

Agentio is an intelligence company. Our product is built on a compounding data moat — every campaign makes our models smarter, which drives better outcomes for brands and creators. Our talent function should work exactly the same way.

Most recruiting functions are sitting on a goldmine of signal they have never connected. Candidate behavior, interview performance, sourcing conversion, outreach response rates — it is all there, spread across a stack of tools that do not talk to each other. The intelligence layer on top of it does not exist yet. We are building it.

We need someone to design and own that layer — the systems, automations, and agent orchestration that power every strategic talent decision we make, and that give our recruiters back the time to do what they do best: build relationships and close exceptional people.

Every hire should make the next hire smarter. That is the compounding moat we are after, and this role is how we build it.

This role is a natural fit for someone with an interest in product or ops. The work itself is genuine systems and infrastructure building, and the skills compound in that direction.



What you'll build

 - The intelligence engine that powers strategic talent decisions — identifying which candidates we should be going after, what we know about them, and how to prioritize our energy before we have even made contact.

 - An orchestration layer that automates the repeatable and surfaces the important, so our recruiters spend their time on relationships, not admin.

 - AI agent

source_jobs.title: Strategic Finance Lead
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT AGENTIO

Agentio enables marketers to buy creator led ads as easily and scalably as Meta or Google ads—automating sourcing, pricing, contracting, delivery, and measurement—so work that took months now happens in minutes.

We're on a mission to transform a $800B digital ad ecosystem by shifting digital ad spend into the hands of creators. That means better outcomes for marketers and enabling creators to live off their work—finally being paid in proportion to the value they create. That shift is accelerating: Unilever's CEO has said the company will move roughly half of its ad budget into social and creators—Unilever is among the world's largest advertisers, spending around $9–10B annually. As these dollars move, they need performance-grade pipes; Agentio is how those dollars flow to creators with the speed, control, and measurement marketers expect. We enable brands like Uber, DoorDash, and Bombas to run creator campaigns with the same rigor, control, and accountability as their core performance channels.

Our AI-Native platform enables real-time content understanding at scale, simultaneous reasoning across hundreds of thousands of pieces of content, and intelligent allocation of multi-million dollar budgets. Our models apply more cross-platform performance signal than anyone else in the world, compounding with every campaign through a high-trust marketplace with accelerating network effects. The result is a flywheel: brands get the performance they've been chasing, creators get the intelligence and income they deserve, and Agentio becomes the infrastructure powering a generational shift in where media dollars flow.

The market agrees. Agentio has raised $56M at a $340M valuation, including a Series B led by Forerunner https://techcrunch.com/2025/11/18/agentio-secures-40-million-from-forerunner-as-it-scales-its-creator-marketplace-beyond-youtube/ that followed our Series A within a calendar year. Backed by Benchmark, Craft, and AlleyCorp. Named to Forbes' Next Billion Dollar Startups, 2025 https://www.forbes.com/sites/amyfeldman/2025/08/12/next-billion-dollar-startups-2025/. Named to Inc.'s Best Places to Work 2026 https://www.inc.com/best-workplaces/2026, one of 10 companies nationally recognized in the "On the Rise: 0–4 Years in Business" category.

An $800B market. A once-in-a-generation technology shift. This is the moment. This is the team. Come build something generational with us.




THE ROLE

Our Finance & Ops function is scaling alongside the business and you’ll be the founding member of the Strategic Finance team, reporting directly to our VP, Finance & Ops. This is a rare chance to help build the strategic backbone of a category-defining marketplace from the ground up. Strategic Finance at Agentio is an offensive function. Our job is not to find clever ways to spend less. It is to understand where capital can make the business move faster, then deploy it with precision.

That means knowing the business cold: every input, output, constraint, and lever. Where is demand converting? Where is supply tight? Where is liquidity breaking? Where does one more dollar create compounding returns? The work is to find those moments before they are obvious, size them, fund them, and prove them.

Agentio's growth depends on liquidity. Brands need to find the right creators. Creators need to deliver. Both sides need to come back. Strategic Finance puts a number on those dynamics and turns them into operating bets.

The best Strategic Finance work does not look like a budget you protected. It looks like a P&L that got bigger because you found the lever and had the conviction to push it. We do not just forecast the P&L. We design the experiments that change it.




WHAT YOU’LL OWN

The main job is capital allocation. You frame the big spend decisions (the next dollar of incentive, headcount, or product investment), build the business case, and bring a real point of view instead of a menu of options. You’ll do that by:



Marketpl

About the role

We’re looking for a Video Content Producer and Creator who is a natural storyteller, relentlessly prolific, and obsessed with making great content—not just planning it. This is a hands-on, high-output role for someone who can move from concept to edit to publish fast, and who has a sharp instinct for what resonates on social and traditional channels.

You’ll own content creation across Agentio’s brand, creator, and employee channels—producing everything from polished case studies, long-form content series, to lo-fi in-office clips to live event coverage. You’ll work directly with our creator network, marketing team, and leadership to turn Agentio into a social and content machine. This is a dream job for someone who is deeply embedded in the creator economy and wants to help build the company that’s powering it.



What You’ll Do

 - Own end-to-end video content production—concept, script, shoot, edit, and publish—across Instagram, LinkedIn, YouTube, TikTok, X and emerging platforms.

 - Create content across formats and audiences: brand storytelling, creator spotlights, thought-leadership, employee content, case studies, event coverage, lo-fi office clips, and more.

 - Develop hooks, narratives, and formats that drive engagement and shareability—with a strong instinct for what stops the scroll.

 - Act as creative director on shoots: direct talent, manage creative vision, and oversee copy, film, and design elements.

 - Collaborate with our creator and marketer network to develop content that authentically represents

source_jobs.title: Shape Your Role at Agentio
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT AGENTIO

Agentio enables marketers to buy creator led ads as easily and scalably as Meta or Google ads—automating sourcing, pricing, contracting, delivery, and measurement—so work that took months now happens in minutes.

We're on a mission to transform a $800B digital ad ecosystem by shifting digital ad spend into the hands of creators. That means better outcomes for marketers and enabling creators to live off their work—finally being paid in proportion to the value they create. That shift is accelerating: Unilever's CEO has said the company will move roughly half of its ad budget into social and creators—Unilever is among the world's largest advertisers, spending around $9–10B annually. As these dollars move, they need performance-grade pipes; Agentio is how those dollars flow to creators with the speed, control, and measurement marketers expect. We enable brands like Uber, DoorDash, and Bombas to run creator campaigns with the same rigor, control, and accountability as their core performance channels.

Our AI-Native platform enables real-time content understanding at scale, simultaneous reasoning across hundreds of thousands of pieces of content, and intelligent allocation of multi-million dollar budgets. Our models apply more cross-platform performance signal than anyone else in the world, compounding with every campaign through a high-trust marketplace with accelerating network effects. The result is a flywheel: brands get the performance they've been chasing, creators get the intelligence and income they deserve, and Agentio becomes the infrastructure powering a generational shift in where media dollars flow.

The market agrees. Agentio has raised $56M at a $340M valuation, including a Series B led by Forerunner https://techcrunch.com/2025/11/18/agentio-secures-40-million-from-forerunner-as-it-scales-its-creator-marketplace-beyond-youtube/ that followed our Series A within a calendar year. Backed by Benchmark, Craft, and AlleyCorp. Named to Forbes' Next Billion Dollar Startups, 2025 https://www.forbes.com/sites/amyfeldman/2025/08/12/next-billion-dollar-startups-2025/. Named to Inc.'s Best Places to Work 2026 https://www.inc.com/best-workplaces/2026, one of 10 companies nationally recognized in the "On the Rise: 0–4 Years in Business" category.

An $800B market. A once-in-a-generation technology shift. This is the moment. This is the team. Come build something generational with us.

Our team is made up of ambitious builders and problem-solvers across Engineering, Product, Sales, Strategy, and Operations. We come from diverse backgrounds, but share one belief: creators are the future of advertising and we have a unique opportunity to build that future together.

We're working at an unprecedented pace to define a category where creator-led advertising fuels growth for brands and creators. Don’t see the perfect role listed? Reach out anyway.




ABOUT YOU

You might be a great fit if you are:

 - Nimble, hungry, humble, and adaptive to change

 - Excited to learn and grow in a fast-paced environment

 - A true problem-solver and self-starter, with incredible ambition and drive

 - Competitive and highly motivated to exceed expectations

 - Ready to roll up your sleeves, get things done, and work harder than you’ve likely ever worked before, but with far greater reward

 - A fun, honest, empathetic, and curious teammate

 - You understand that Agentio is building in-person, and is in-office 5 days/week
   
   


TELL US WHY YOU WANT TO JOIN AND WHAT YOU’D BRING TO THE TEAM.

We review every submission and keep an open mind about the right talent — now or in the future. If there’s a fit, we’ll be in touch. Can’t wait to hear from you!

As an Account Executive on our Creator Partnerships team, you'll own the supply side of Agentio's marketplace — building direct relationships with the world's most influential creators and the C-suite leaders at top talent management firms. You'll be closing partnerships worth hundreds of thousands to millions of dollars, and you'll be doing it fast, at volume, with zero excuses.

We're a team of five today. The people who perform here won't just hit quota — they'll define what great looks like and build the team around it.

ABOUT AGENTIO

Agentio enables marketers to buy creator led ads as easily and scalably as Meta or Google ads—automating sourcing, pricing, contracting, delivery, and measurement—so work that took months now happens in minutes.

Named to Inc.'s Best Places to Work 2026 https://www.inc.com/best-workplaces/2026, one of 10 companies nationally recognized in the "On the Rise: 0–4 Years in Business" category.

An $800B market. A once-in-a-generation technology shift. This is the moment. This is the team. Come build something generational with us.




DATA IS OUR GROWTH ENGINE

Our platform routes budgets to the right creators, at the right price, with clear attribution. We ingest rich first-party signals across creative briefs, audiences, content, and outcomes; link them to conversions; and train LLM-driven ranking and pricing models that guide every step—from discovery and acceptance likelihood to pacing and scale. Each campaign feeds back new data, creating a compounding learning loop that makes matching, forecasting, and measurement more efficient with every use.

We’re expanding our data practice and hiring foundational teammates. Whether you analyze behavior, model outcomes, run experiments, or build robust data and ML tooling, you’ll have an immediate impact—shaping product decisions, improving measurement, and delivering the pipelines and services that power the platform.

At Agentio, data drives decisions—what we build, how we price, and where we scale—so creators and brands win together. If you’re curious, collaborative, and excited to own outcomes in a fast-moving environment, let’s talk.



ABOUT YOU

 - Nimble, hungry, humble, and adaptive to change

 - Excited to learn and grow in a fast-paced environment

 - Proven track record of applying analytical/statistical methods to tackle real-world problems using big data.

 - A true problem-solver and self-starter, with incredible ambition and drive

THE ROLE

As an Agency Partnerships Director, you will own and grow Agentio’s relationships with major agency holding companies and top enterprise agencies. You’ll act as a strategic partner and trusted advisor, helping agency leadership and client teams integrate Agentio into their marketing strategies and drive meaningful business outcomes for their brands.

This is a high-touch, consultative role focused on long-term partnership development, revenue growth, and executive-level influence.




WHAT YOU’LL DO

 - Build and deepen strategic partnerships with enterprise agencies and agency holding companies, from day-to-day operators to senior leadership.

 - Own a portfolio of enterprise agency relationships and drive revenue growth, adoption, and retention across key accounts.

 - Serve as a trusted advisor to agencies, helping them translate client goals into effective creator-led campaigns using Agentio.

Named to Inc.'s Best Places to Work 2026 https://www.inc.com/best-workplaces/2026, one of 10 companies nationally recognized in the "On the Rise: 0–4 Years in Business" category.

An $800B market. A once-in-a-generation technology shift. This is the moment. This is the team. Come build something generational with us.




ABOUT THE ROLE

The talent landscape is the most competitive it's been in years. The bar for exceptional is higher, and the profile has changed. The tools available to find, evaluate, and close that talent are changing faster than most teams can keep up with. And the old playbook, the one honed at Meta, Google, or your last three startups, isn't keeping pace.

We're not looking for someone who has recruiting figured out. We're looking for someone who recognizes that nobody does right now, and wants to be the person who figures it out.

Agentio is the AI-native programmatic infrastructure layer for creator media buying, backed by Benchmark, Forerunner, and Craft, raised $56M at a $340M valuation, and named to Forbes' Next Billion Dollar Startups. We're building a flywheel grounded in a first-party data moat: every campaign makes our pricing, matching, and measurement smarter, which drives better outcomes for brands and higher earnings for creators. In an industry that largely profits from replacing human labor, we've built our entire business on a different premise. The best advertising is human. The best way to buy, execute and measure it is agentic.



What You'll Do

You'll own full-cycle technical recruiting,(sourcing through close), partnering directly with our CTO and Head of Talent to grow the engineering team defining our next phase. But the real mandate is bigger: help us build a recruiting function that reflects the moment we're in, not the one we were in five years ago.

That means approaching this work with a genuine spirit

ABOUT THE ROLE

As a foundational member of the go-to-market team, you'll work directly with the CEO, Head of Sales (Brand), and VP of Creator Strategy to scale our enterprise and mid-market advertisers on Agentio as an individual contributor. This is a unique opportunity for someone who wants to be on the ground floor of a generational platform redefining advertising and creator monetization. You will have immense responsibility and deep involvement in the campaign success of some of the world’s leading brands and creators on YouTube.




WHAT YOU'LL DO

 - Generate significant new revenue by onboarding enterprise and mid-market advertisers onto the Agentio ad platform as an individual contributor

 - Own the entire sales funnel and customer journey, from prospecting, to closing new accounts, and helping new advertisers succeed and grow on Agentio

 - Evangelize and educate prospective customers on the efficiency and performance of YouTube and creator-led sponsored content ad reads

 - Build and grow key relationships with brand partners who are highly analytical and data-driven

 - Be a prospecting wizard, able to stack your calendar with 15+ outbound meetings/week through a systematic, highly personalized prospecting process

 - Generate and execute sales plans and strategies to exceed ambitious, but realistic sales targets

 - Help co-author the playbook for brand sales at Agentio, creating scalable processes for future team members

 - Work with our creator partnerships team to optimize creator-brand fit

 - Be a dedicated leader

The result is a flywheel: brands get the performance they've been chasing, creators get the intelligence and income they deserve, and Agentio becomes the infrastructure powering a generational shift in where media dollars flow.

ABOUT THE ROLE

Agentio is seeking a Marketing Science Lead to establish our measurement practice as we scale creator marketing as performance infrastructure for brands. As the creator economy matures from experimentation to essential layer, advertisers need rigorous frameworks to measure ROI and optimize creator investments. You'll be the analytical architect who defines how clients measure success, influences what we build, and shapes industry standards for creator marketing effectiveness.





WHAT YOU'LL DO

 - Define the Standard for Creator Performance: Act as the chief architect for how the industry quantifies creator marketing. You will establish the frameworks that integrate Agentio into the world’s most sophisticated Marketing Mix Models (MMM), ensuring our platform is recognized as essential infrastructure, not just another social channel.

 - Become a Trusted Advisor: Partner with the most sophisticated marketers in the world (e.g., Uber, DoorDash, Mint Mobile) to design bespoke measurement strategies. You will build high-level credibility as their go-to consultant for incrementality, brand lift, and sales attribution.

 - Drive the Global Measurement Roadmap: Partner deeply with Product and Engineering to translate complex client needs into a world-class measurement suite. You will anticipate where the industry is headed and build the "performance-grade pipes" to get there.
